name: The Back Nine Golf | Keller, TX
about: The Back Nine Golf in Keller, TX is a golf simulation venue that provides a private space for golf practice and play. The venue offers a modern environment for golfers of all skill levels to enjoy simulated rounds and improve their game. Located in Keller, it serves as a convenient option for local golfers seeking a dedicated golf simulation experience without access to traditional course facilities.
why_golfers_like_it: Private, distraction-free environment for focused practice
Convenient location in Keller for local golfers
Professional space for hosting corporate golf events
Dedicated simulation technology for game improvement

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar service with cocktails and beverages

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available at the venue, but you can bring your own equipment if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring outside food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers a full kitchen and bar service, though outside food and drinks may be restricted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes of simulated golf takes approximately 1.5-2 hours depending on the simulator software and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The Back Nine Golf welcomes families, though availability for junior golf programs or specific kid-friendly amenities should be confirmed directly with the venue.
